channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 16.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: What is Keir Starmer’s plan to increase UK defence spending and is it affordable?

item.title: Independent UK Politics: John Healey resigns latest: Starmer ally says defence spending plan falls short at ‘dangerous’ time in scathing letter

item.title: Independent UK Politics: John Healey’s resignation is the beginning of the end for Starmer
item.description: John Healey’s resignation is the beginning of the end for Starmer
